discussion_comments.comment_body: Thanks for the catch. The force-push to 49a0ff9 already replaced the literal `git@` with the broader `[A-Za-z0-9._\-]+@` username class on both SSH alternatives (lines 434-435), so URLs like `alice@host:org/repo.git` and `ssh://alice@host/...` are now accepted. I've added `tests/test_git_url_validation.py` (commit 83ef46d) as a regression test parametrizing those non-`git` SSH usernames alongside the original `git@` and `https` forms, plus a few unsafe-URL rejections.

discussion_comments.comment_body: Here we should not determine auth and csrf based on one/any of existing, we should connect directly to an endpoint (handler) via URL and that handler should determine what's needed, just like we do with API endpoint classes.

commented_code:
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
+
+
+def test_update_chat_input_syncs_store_before_follow_up_send():
+    index_js = (PROJECT_ROOT / "webui" / "index.js").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    speech_store_js = (
+        PROJECT_ROOT / "webui" / "components" / "chat" / "speech" / "speech-store.js"
+    ).read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    update_chat_input_start = index_js.index("export function updateChatInput(text) {")
+    update_chat_input_end = index_js.index("async function updateUserTime()")
+    update_chat_input_block = index_js[
+        update_chat_input_start:update_chat_input_end
+    ]

discussion_comments.commented_code:
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
+
+
+def test_update_chat_input_syncs_store_before_follow_up_send():
+    index_js = (PROJECT_ROOT / "webui" / "index.js").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    speech_store_js = (
+        PROJECT_ROOT / "webui" / "components" / "chat" / "speech" / "speech-store.js"
+    ).read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    update_chat_input_start = index_js.index("export function updateChatInput(text) {")
+    update_chat_input_end = index_js.index("async function updateUserTime()")
+    update_chat_input_block = index_js[
+        update_chat_input_start:update_chat_input_end
+    ]
discussion_comments.comment_body:
Addressed in commit 0221cff3.
Added regression coverage for rejected non-token-path requests, including wrong Bearer credentials, wrong X-API-KEY / query api_key, and the no-auth case, while keeping the existing compare_digest path assertions in place.
